redaction_note: The full stream-json raw trace was NOT retained: it carried a session id, request/uuid ids, cwd, and the local Claude Code environment's mcp_servers/skills/slash_commands/memory path. Only the fields needed for the study's conclusions are kept below; all identifiers are replaced by stable placeholders (the same session id appeared 4x in the original and is shown once as <redacted-session-id>). No API/OAuth token was present in the trace.

observed_model.exact_policy_note: ModelPolicy::Exact must compare base_model, context_profile, and (if it becomes load-bearing) service_tier as SEPARATE fields — not by naively stripping the [..] suffix. The init string carries the context profile ([1m]) that the assistant string omits; over-aggressive normalization that discards the suffix would mask a genuine profile change, while a naive string compare of raw_init vs raw_assistant would false-positive here.

rate_limit_event.note: This dedicated rate_limit_event is exactly the signal Consilium's Claude adapter DROPS (adapters/claude.rs:54-104 only handle system/assistant/result). See event-mapping.json (o7_event rate_limit = missing).
